== Notes for [[Item:Q102576|Q102576]] ==


Mar Pahga,

occupation: temp. exilarch during youth of Mar Zutra to:

sister of Mar Zutra, daughter of Haninai (Huna VI) and nn

1) Huna Mar Huna (Ahunai), birth 520, died 581, occupation: Exilarch to: nn

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000009708369560

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
